TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Elven Conclaves Faction.

Translations.Comment: Council assemblies. 'Concilii' conveys organized, council-like nature of elven society.
Spear infantry. Direct martial terminology emphasizing disciplined spear-wielders.
City defenders. Traditional term for civic guard with defensive duty.
Elite warriors. Directly conveys mastery and elite martial skill.
Legendary archers. Captures the famed archery skill of elves.
Vigilant guardians. Implies watchfulness and protection duty.
Siege weapon. Captures the projectile-throwing nature of this artillery.
Lance cavalry. Elegant compound conveying mounted elite troops.
Fast raiders. Conveys raiding nature of swift cavalry units.
War chariot. Classic military terminology befitting elven forces.
Majestic flyer. Direct and captures nobility of this creature for elves.
Dragon-riding elite. Elegant compound conveying both rider prestige and mount power.
Primordial wyrm. Emphasizes age, wisdom, and ancient power.
Mythological creature. Standard Italian term for gryphon/griffin.
Aristocratic leader. Conveys grace, authority, and noble heritage.
Wizard. Standard Italian fantasy term for mage/sorcerer.
Martial-magical hybrid. 'Lama Magica' (magical blade) conveys sword-wielder with magical power.
